## What changed?

Describe the user-facing change in a few sentences.

## Why?

What problem does this solve? Link the issue or discussion if one exists.

## Safety and data boundary

- [ ] This stays local and read-only.
- [ ] This can write a workspace, but the user sees a review/apply step.
- [ ] This can access web or cloud services, and has explicit consent + scope visibility.
- [ ] This can propose a terminal command, but cannot silently execute it.
- [ ] Not applicable.

If this changes a boundary, explain the exact data and user approval flow.

## Verification

- [ ] I ran the relevant checks.
- [ ] I tested the UI at the relevant compact and desktop widths.
- [ ] I did not add keys, private project contents, or telemetry.
- [ ] I updated docs, test coverage, or screenshots where needed.
